zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford於1429年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford20歲，母親Margaret Botreaux17歲。他於1440年11月4日與Alianor Molines在英國英格蘭薩默塞特格福德結婚。他去世於1464年5月18日在他的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford于1429年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford20岁，母亲Margaret Botreaux17岁。他于1440年11月4日与Alianor Molines在英国英格兰薩默塞特格福德结婚。他去世于1464年5月18日在他的家乡享年35岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford was born in 1429, in England, his father, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, was 20 and his mother, Margaret Botreaux, was 17. He married Alianor Molines on 4 November 1440, in Hungerford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. He died on 18 May 1464, in his hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford est né en 1429, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Botreaux, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Alianor Molines le 4 novembre 1440, à Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1464, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford 1429 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford 20 und seine Mutter Margaret Botreaux 17. Er hat am 4. November 1440 in Hungerford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Alianor Molines geheiratet. Er starb am 18. Mai 1464 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford è nato il nel 1429 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Botreaux, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Alianor Molines il 4 novembre 1440, nel Hungerford, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 18 maggio 1464, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerfordが1429年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerfordは20歳，母Margaret Botreauxは17歳であった。1440年11月4日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトハンジャーフォードでAlianor Molinesと結婚した。彼は1464年5月18日に故郷で35歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford(이)가 1429년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Botreaux(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1440년 11월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 헌그르퍼드에서 Alianor Molines(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1464년 5월 18일 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England: Farleigh Hungerford, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford nasceu em 1429, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Botreaux, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Alianor Molines em 4 de novembro de 1440, em Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1464, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford родился в 1429 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Botreaux, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Alianor Molines 4 ноября 1440 г. в местности хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 18 мая 1464 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford nació en 1429, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Botreaux, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Alianor Molines el 4 de noviembre de 1440, en Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1464, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
